memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of Arms of Berkeley, Barons Berkeley
memoryArtifacts.description: Arms: Gules, a Chevron between 10 Crosses pattée, 6 in Chief & 4 in Base Argent.....Crest: A Mitre Gules labelled & garnished Or charged with a Chevron & Crosses pattée as in the Arms.

memoryArtifacts.headline: He and wife were originally burried here in Bristol chapel

popularStory.headline: Thomas de Berkeley, 1st Baron Berkeley
popularStory.description:
Thomas de Berkeley, 1st Baron Berkeley (1245 – 23 July 1321), aka The Wise, was an English baron, soldier and diplomat.[1]

Thomas de Berkeley was born in 1245 at Berkeley Castle in the English coun …

zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley於1245年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley27歲，母親Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard20歲。他於大約1267年與Joan de Ferrers在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1265年登記服兵役。他於1277年被列為vice constable of england。他去世於1321年7月23日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley于1245年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley27岁，母亲Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard20岁。他于大约1267年与Joan de Ferrers在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1265年登记服兵役。他于1277年被列为vice constable of england。他去世于1321年7月23日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley was born in 1245, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, was 20. He married Joan de Ferrers about 1267, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1265. In 1277, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as vice constable of england. He died on 23 July 1321, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley est né en 1245, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Ferrers environ 1267, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1265. En 1277, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est vice constable of england. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1321, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Chilham Castle, Kent, England: Chilham Castle, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley 1245 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard 20. Er hat um 1267 in England Joan de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1265 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1277, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als vice constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Juli 1321 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bristol, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley è nato il nel 1245 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Ferrers circa 1267, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1265. Nel 1277, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come vice constable of england. Morì il 23 luglio 1321, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeleyが1245年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeleyは27歳，母Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichardは20歳であった。約1267年にイギリスでJoan de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年に兵役登録をした。1277年，32歳の時，職業はvice constable of englandと記録されている。彼は1321年7月23日に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley(이)가 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1267년 영국에서 Joan de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1277년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 vice constable of england이었다. 그는 1321년 7월 23일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley nasceu em 1245, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Ferrers aproximadamente 1267, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1265. Em 1277, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como vice constable of england. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1321, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Chilham Castle, Kent, England: Chilham Castle, Kent, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley родился в 1245 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Ferrers около 1267 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1265 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1277 году, в возрасте 32 лет, работал по профессии vice constable of england. Он умер 23 июля 1321 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley nació en 1245, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Maurice de Berkeley 5th feudal baron of Berkeley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Fitzroy FitzRichard, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan de Ferrers aproximadamente 1267, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1265. En 1277, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era vice constable of england. Murió el 23 de julio de 1321, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
